mustPass: home route with path '/' is present
all default routes have matching sectionsPerRoute entries
route ids and section ids use kebab-case slugs
paths are Swedish, lowercase, start with '/', and have no trailing slash
page set fits companies selling office services and business support rather than consumer retail or hospitality
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: generic route sets that ignore the need to explain specific support services
vague service copy without examples of actual administrative or support tasks
invented certifications, customer counts or guarantees
forcing booking flows when the industry more often converts via inquiry or quote request
